# Quantoryn — Vendor API Access Kit

**Quantoryn** is a scientific operating system for endurance coaching organizations.
This kit is prepared for prospective API partnership and technical review.

**Location**: Córdoba, Argentina
**Partnerships**: partnerships@quantoryn.com
**Website**: https://quantoryn.com

---

## Outreach documents (vendor-facing)

Start here. These documents are written for business, legal, and partnership teams.

| Document | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [Platform Overview](quantoryn-overview) | Platform philosophy, architecture principles, supported sports, provider status |
| [Integration Architecture](integration-architecture) | How providers connect, ingest, and normalize into Quantoryn |
| [Data Handling](data-handling) | OAuth token lifecycle, webhook ingestion, provider isolation, data classification, retention |
| [Privacy Policy](privacy-policy) | How athlete data is collected, stored, and protected |
| [Terms of Service](terms-of-service) | Platform usage terms, athlete data ownership, liability |
| [Vendor Contact](vendor-contact) | Official contacts, partnership request process, response SLAs |

---

## Technical evidence kit (engineering review)

Detailed documents for vendor engineering and security teams.

| Document | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [Data Access Specification](data-access-spec) | Data access spec — Required vs Optional fields, per-sport needs, Phase 1 vs Phase 2 scope |
| [Vendor Readiness Summary](requirements-checklist) | Readiness overview across Legal, Security, OAuth, Data handling, and Operational dimensions |

---

## Recommended review path

**For business / BD / legal teams:**
1. Platform Overview
2. Data Handling
3. Privacy Policy
4. Terms of Service
5. Vendor Contact — to initiate partnership

**For engineering / security teams:**
1. Integration Architecture
2. Data Access Specification
3. Vendor Readiness Summary

---

## Contact

**Partnerships and API inquiries**: partnerships@quantoryn.com
**Privacy and data questions**: support@quantoryn.com
**Security disclosures**: security@quantoryn.com
